description: CompositionGrey track pants made of 100% polyester Dri Fit fabric, that has a wide waist band, neon yellow panel detailing on the flared legs and toggle straps at the hemFitComfortWash careWash separately with like coloursDo not use softenersDo not allow to lay on itself when wetDo not bleachCool iron Get more out of your work outs and yoga sessions with this flattering pair of tracks from nike. The wide waistband and flared legs flatter most body types while the Dri-Fit fabric wicks sweat away from the body and keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long. Team this with tees and sports footwear for trips to the gym.Model statisticsThe product is a size M with length 48" on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
